description:
The quiz evaluates practical PostgreSQL knowledge, testing skills in using built‑in aggregates, type casting, constraints, and other nuanced features. It is moderate to advanced in difficulty, presented in an encouraging, instructional tone that highlights learning and achievement.
Topics: PostgreSQL aggregates, Type casting, Constraints, Advanced SQL features, Database gotchas
Audience: Developers and database professionals with intermediate to advanced experience in PostgreSQL who want to deepen their expertise.
